groups.name: agent.llm
groups.description: Configuration properties for multi-LLM provider support.

properties.name: agent.llm.provider
properties.description: LLM provider to use. Supported values: anthropic, openai, ollama, azure-openai, mistral.

properties.name: agent.llm.model-name
properties.description: Model name or identifier for the chosen provider.

properties.name: agent.llm.api-key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate with the LLM provider.

properties.name: agent.llm.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the LLM provider API endpoint.

properties.name: agent.llm.temperature
properties.description: Sampling temperature (0.0 – 1.0). Lower values produce more deterministic output.

properties.name: agent.llm.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate in a single response.

properties.name: agent.llm.timeout
properties.description: HTTP request timeout when calling the LLM provider.
